body: Bank Indonesia and Bank Negara Malaysia have enabled a local currency exchange with a total value of up to IDR 82 trillion (MYR 24 billion) over the next 5 years, following the renewal of their local currency bilateral swap agreement. This agreement aims to support key policies in monetary, macroprudential, and payment systems, and is expected to deepen trade and financial linkages between the two countries.
title: Bank Indonesia and Bank Negara Malaysia Renew Local Currency Swap Agreement Worth IDR 82 Trillion.

body: PT Bangun Karya Perkasa Jaya Tbk (KRYA) has secured a contract worth IDR 22.35 billion to build 7 warehouses for PT Karunia Alam Segar, bringing its total new contracts in 2024 to IDR 56.61 billion. The project, which has begun its groundbreaking phase, is expected to be completed within 7 months, with KRYA committed to conducting maintenance for 6 months after completion.
title: PT Bangun Karya Perkasa Jaya secures IDR 22.35 billion contract to build 7 warehouses for Mie Sedaap raw ingredient storage.

body: The Financial Services Authority (OJK) has revoked the license of PT Asuransi Allianz Life Indonesia's Sharia unit, which will be transferred to PT Asuransi Allianz Life Syariah Indonesia, prohibiting AALI from conducting life insurance activities based on Sharia principles. As of July 2024, the Sharia unit reported investment income of IDR 541.35 million and a profit after taxes of IDR 478 million.
title: Financial Services Authority Revokes License of Allianz Life Indonesia's Sharia Unit Ahead of Business Transfer.

body: PT Adira Dinamika Multifinance Tbk plans to issue a shelf-registration bond worth IDR 2 trillion in Phase IV of its 2024 program, which is part of a larger IDR 9 trillion public offering program. The bond will be offered in three series with principals totaling IDR 2 trillion, with coupon rates ranging from 6.45% to 6.80% per annum, and proceeds will be used for consumer financing activities.
title: Adira Dinamika Multifinance to Issue IDR 2 Trillion Shelf-Registration Bond in Phase IV of 2024 Program
